mapper.select:
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, major_code AS majorCode, major_name AS majorName, sub_code AS subCode, sub_name AS subName, use_yn AS useYn FROM emission_category WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
AND ( LOWER(major_code) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR LOWER(major_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR LOWER(sub_code) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR LOWER(sub_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{_parameter}) || '%' )
ORDER BY major_name, sub_name
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, major_code AS majorCode, major_name AS majorName, sub_code AS subCode, sub_name AS subName, use_yn AS useYn FROM emission_category WHERE category_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT category_id AS categoryId, major_code AS majorCode, major_name AS majorName, sub_code AS subCode, sub_name AS subName, use_yn AS useYn FROM emission_category WHERE sub_code = #{_parameter} ORDER BY category_id LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT tier FROM emission_variable_def WHERE category_id = #{_parameter} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tier

SELECT variable_id AS variableId, category_id AS categoryId, tier, var_code AS varCode, var_name AS varName, var_desc AS varDesc, unit, input_type AS inputType, source_type AS sourceType, is_repeatable AS repeatable, is_required AS required, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn , display_name AS displayName , display_code AS displayCode , ui_hint AS uiHint , derived_yn AS derivedYn , supplemental_yn AS supplementalYn , repeat_group_key AS repeatGroupKey , section_id AS sectionId , section_title AS sectionTitle , section_description AS sectionDescription , section_formula AS sectionFormula FROM emission_variable_def WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND tier = #{tier} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, variable_id

SELECT factor_id AS factorId, category_id AS categoryId, tier, factor_code AS factorCode, factor_name AS factorName, factor_value AS factorValue, unit, default_yn AS defaultYn, remark FROM emission_factor WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND tier = #{tier} ORDER BY factor_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO emission_input_session ( category_id, tier, created_by, calc_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{tier}, #{createdBy}, #{calcStatus}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
SELECT emission_input_session_ai_session_id.current_value FROM db_root

INSERT INTO emission_input_value ( session_id, var_code, line_no, value_num, value_text, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{varCode}, #{lineNo}, #{valueNum}, #{valueText}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
SELECT emission_input_value_ai_input_value_id.current_value FROM db_root
mapper.select: SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, s.category_id AS categoryId, s.tier AS tier, s.created_by AS createdBy, s.calc_status AS calcStatus, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.major_code AS majorCode, c.major_name AS majorName, c.sub_code AS subCode, c.sub_name AS subName FROM emission_input_session s INNER JOIN emission_category c ON c.category_id = s.category_id WHERE s.session_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT input_value_id AS inputValueId, session_id AS sessionId, var_code AS varCode, line_no AS lineNo, value_num AS valueNum, value_text AS valueText, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM emission_input_value WHERE session_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY line_no, input_value_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO emission_calc_result ( session_id, co2_total, formula_summary, factor_snapshot_json, default_applied_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{co2Total}, #{formulaSummary}, #{factorSnapshotJson}, #{defaultAppliedYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
SELECT emission_calc_result_ai_result_id.current_value FROM db_root

INSERT INTO emission_category ( major_code, major_name, sub_code, sub_name, use_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{majorCode}, #{majorName}, #{subCode}, #{subName}, #{useYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
SELECT emission_category_ai_category_id.current_value FROM db_root

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(variable_id), 0) + 1 FROM emission_variable_def
INSERT INTO emission_variable_def ( variable_id, category_id, tier, var_code, var_name, var_desc, unit, input_type, source_type, is_repeatable, is_required, sort_order, display_name, display_code, ui_hint, derived_yn, supplemental_yn, repeat_group_key, section_id, section_title, section_description, section_formula, use_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{variableId}, #{categoryId}, #{tier}, #{varCode}, #{varName}, #{varDesc}, #{unit}, #{inputType}, #{sourceType}, #{repeatable}, #{required}, #{sortOrder}, #{displayName}, #{displayCode}, #{uiHint}, #{derivedYn}, #{supplementalYn}, #{repeatGroupKey}, #{sectionId}, #{sectionTitle}, #{sectionDescription}, #{sectionFormula}, #{useYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE emission_variable_def SET var_name = #{varName}, var_desc = #{varDesc}, unit = #{unit}, input_type = #{inputType}, source_type = #{sourceType}, is_repeatable = #{repeatable}, is_required = #{required}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, display_name = #{displayName}, display_code = #{displayCode}, ui_hint = #{uiHint}, derived_yn = #{derivedYn}, supplemental_yn = #{supplementalYn}, repeat_group_key = #{repeatGroupKey}, section_id = #{sectionId}, section_title = #{sectionTitle}, section_description = #{sectionDescription}, section_formula = #{sectionFormula}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND tier = #{tier} AND var_code = #{varCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emission_materialization_history ( scope, category_code, tier, draft_id, published_version_id, materialized_by, materialized_at, created_category_yn, inserted_variable_count, updated_variable_count ) VALUES ( #{scope}, #{categoryCode}, #{tier}, #{draftId}, #{publishedVersionId}, #{materializedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{createdCategoryYn}, #{insertedVariableCount}, #{updatedVariableCount} )
mapper.select: SELECT history_id AS historyId, scope, category_code AS categoryCode, tier, draft_id AS draftId, published_version_id AS publishedVersionId, materialized_by AS materializedBy, TO_CHAR(materialized_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS materializedAt, created_category_yn AS createdCategoryYn, inserted_variable_count AS insertedVariableCount, updated_variable_count AS updatedVariableCount FROM emission_materialization_history WHERE category_code = #{categoryCode} AND tier = #{tier} ORDER BY history_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emission_runtime_transition_history ( scope, category_code, tier, transitioned_by, transitioned_at, session_id, result_id, runtime_mode, promotion_status, promotion_message, definition_formula_adopted_yn, legacy_total, definition_total, delta ) VALUES ( #{scope}, #{categoryCode}, #{tier}, #{transitionedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{sessionId}, #{resultId}, #{runtimeMode}, #{promotionStatus}, #{promotionMessage}, #{definitionFormulaAdoptedYn}, #{legacyTotal}, #{definitionTotal}, #{delta} )
mapper.select: SELECT history_id AS historyId, scope, category_code AS categoryCode, tier, transitioned_by AS transitionedBy, TO_CHAR(transitioned_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS transitionedAt, session_id AS sessionId, result_id AS resultId, runtime_mode AS runtimeMode, promotion_status AS promotionStatus, promotion_message AS promotionMessage, definition_formula_adopted_yn AS definitionFormulaAdoptedYn, legacy_total AS legacyTotal, definition_total AS definitionTotal, delta FROM emission_runtime_transition_history WHERE category_code = #{categoryCode} AND tier = #{tier} ORDER BY history_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT result_id AS resultId, session_id AS sessionId, co2_total AS co2Total, formula_summary AS formulaSummary, factor_snapshot_json AS factorSnapshotJson, default_applied_yn AS defaultAppliedYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM emission_calc_result WHERE session_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY created_at DESC, result_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.category_id AS categoryId, c.sub_code AS categoryCode, c.sub_name AS categoryName, s.tier AS tier, r.result_id AS resultId, r.session_id AS sessionId, r.co2_total AS co2Total, r.formula_summary AS formulaSummary, r.factor_snapshot_json AS factorSnapshotJson, r.default_applied_yn AS defaultAppliedYn, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM emission_calc_result r INNER JOIN emission_input_session s ON s.session_id = r.session_id INNER JOIN emission_category c ON c.category_id = s.category_id WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM emission_calc_result newer INNER JOIN emission_input_session newer_session ON newer_session.session_id = newer.session_id WHERE newer_session.category_id = s.category_id AND newer_session.tier = s.tier AND ( newer.created_at > r.created_at OR (newer.created_at = r.created_at AND newer.result_id > r.result_id) ) ) ORDER BY c.sub_name, s.tier
